zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Welles於大約1138年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可威爾斯 可特 馮 澤亞時，她的父親William de Welles25歲，母親Maud de Gaunt25歲。她於1155年與Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1212年在英國林可爾史爾坎德尼斯比享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Welles于大约1138年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可威爾斯 可特 馮 澤亞时，她的父亲William de Welles25岁，母亲Maud de Gaunt25岁。她于1155年与Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall在英国林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1212年在英国林可爾史爾坎德尼斯比享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Welles was born about 1138, in Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Welles, was 25 and her mother, Maud de Gaunt, was 25. She married Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall in 1155, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in 1212, in Candlesby, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Welles est née environ 1138, à Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Welles, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Maud de Gaunt, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall en 1155, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en 1212, à Candlesby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.Wells, Norfolk, England: Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Welles um 1138 in Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Welles 25 und ihre Mutter Maud de Gaunt 25. Sie hat 1155 in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb 1212 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Candlesby, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Wellesが約1138年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウエルズ ネクスト ス セアで生まれた時，父William de Wellesは25歳，母Maud de Gauntは25歳であった。1155年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルでLord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1212年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアカンドレスビーで75歳で死去した。

ko.Wells, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 웰스 니스트 테 시
ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Welles(이)가 대략 1138년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 웰스 니스트 테 시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Welles(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Gaunt(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1155년 영국 링코실르 타터샤에서 Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1212년 영국 링코실르 캔들레스비에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Welles nasceu aproximadamente 1138, em Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Welles, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Gaunt, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall em 1155, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1212, em Candlesby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos.

ru.Wells, Norfolk, England: веллс некст т сеа, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Welles родилась около 1138 г. в местности веллс некст т сеа, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Welles было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Gaunt, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall в 1155 г. в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла в 1212 г. в местности кандлесби, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.

Se casó con Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall en 1155, en Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos.
